name: Mount Holly Blueprint (digital overlay extraction v2) (ILR lattice model)

coordinateSystem.note: Node types: room (R), lantern gap (L), intersection (I). IDs: room=A1.., lantern=g(...), intersection=i(x,y).

notes: Edges are inferred from colored diamonds/segments at room boundaries.
Row 0 (A0-E0) is synthetic to model the shared external starting area below C1.
Lantern gaps are explicit hallway nodes between rooms and intersections.
Bottom row is intersections only (IIIIIIIIIII), matching the entrance strip below rank 1.
Known paths and lantern-slot sync verified.
